# Installation > `npm install --save @types/react-dom` # Summary This package contains type definitions for react-dom (https://react.dev/). # Details Files were exported from https://github.com/DefinitelyTyped/DefinitelyTyped/tree/master/types/react-dom. ### Additional Details * Last updated: Wed, 12 Nov 2025 04:37:38 GMT * Dependencies: none * Peer dependencies: [@types/react](https://npmjs.com/package/@types/react) # Credits These definitions were written by [Asana](https://asana.com), [AssureSign](http://www.assuresign.com), [Microsoft](https://microsoft.com), [MartynasZilinskas](https://github.com/MartynasZilinskas), [Josh Rutherford](https://github.com/theruther4d), [Jessica Franco](https://github.com/Jessidhia), and [Sebastian Silbermann](https://github.com/eps1lon).
